name: Kit (ConvertKit)
tagline: The creator marketing platform — built for writers, podcasters, and YouTubers
pros: Purpose-built for creators — writers, podcasters, YouTubers, course sellers
Sell digital products and subscriptions directly without Shopify
Creator Network enables organic audience growth through cross-recommendations
Clean, simple interface — not bloated with features creators don't need
cons: Limited design flexibility — templates are minimal/text-focused
Reporting and analytics are basic compared to Mailchimp or Klaviyo
Expensive relative to features for non-creators
